Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss, Or Alternatively Stay, Due To Inconvenient Forum
Off Calendar Jul-21-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC.s Motion To Dismiss, Or Alternatively Stay, Due To Inconvenient Forum

Defendant's (Uber) alternative motion to stay this action due to inconvenient forum is granted.

(SEE WORD MINUTES FOR COMPLETE DETAILS)

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)
